# Base Clients


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## BaseClient

This class implements the basic abstraction of a client and is
considered the base class for all type of clients

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/fedai/blob/main/fedai/clients/base_client.py#L26"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### BaseClient

``` python

def BaseClient(
    id, # Unique identifier for the client
    cfg, # A configuration object containing all the necessary parameters for training and evaluation.
    train_loader, test_loader,
    state, # A dictionary containing the model, optimizer and any changing component needed.
    criterion, device:NoneType=None, t:int=0, kwargs:VAR_KEYWORD
):

```

*Initialize self. See help(type(self)) for accurate signature.*
